nasb.text: O Lord, there is none like You, nor is there any God besides You, according to all that we have heard with our ears.

esv.text: There is none like you, O Lord, and there is no God besides you, according to all that we have heard with our ears.

cnv.text: 耶和華啊，照著我們耳中所聽見的，沒有誰能與你相比；除你以外，再沒有別的神。

ccb.text: 耶和华啊，我们从未听过有谁能与你相比，你是独一无二的上帝。
